text: Ever wondered how CRISPR crops differ from 90s GMOs? CRISPR technology allows for precise DNA edits, unlike the broad changes of older GMOs. This precision means improved crops with less risk. But regulation? That’s a different story. In the U.S., CRISPR crops often face fewer regulations than traditional GMOs, while Europe has stricter rules. So, while CRISPR offers solutions, the regulations are still catching up to the science. Curious about the future of food? Hit like and follow for more insights!
